changes.description: Replaced hardcoded axis strokes with var(--muted-foreground), added custom tooltip (bg-card border shadow-lg rounded-lg p-3), reduced grid opacity
Added custom tooltip with card-styled container matching bar chart
Replaced hardcoded COLORS with chart CSS variables (--chart-1 through --chart-5) via getComputedStyle with fallbacks
Added empty state with BarChart3 icon when no spending data
Added empty state with TrendingUp icon when no data
Added empty state with Users icon when no members or transactions, removed redundant inline check
NEW: Client component with Sun/Moon toggle, reads/writes dark class + localStorage, respects system preference
Added suppressHydrationWarning to html, inline script to apply dark class before hydration (prevents FOUC)
Mounted ThemeToggle in sidebar footer below nav
